{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "19958e39",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "create a heatmap for correlation matrix?\n",
    "vizulaize the distribution of income?\n",
    "vizualize the product sales across different categories?"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "d1c59c87",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "np.random.seed(42)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "2f3bbce4",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "data = {\n",
    "    \"age\": np.random.randint(20, 60, 100),\n",
    "    \"income\": np.random.randint(30000, 100000, 100),\n",
    "    \"spending_score\": np.random.randint(1, 100, 100)\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "df = pd.DataFrame(data)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "02dc289d",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "corr_matrix = df.corr()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure()\n",
    "sns.heatmap(corr_matrix, annot=True, cmap=\"coolwarm\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"Correlation Matrix Heatmap\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "f5fcceac",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "plt.figure()\n",
    "sns.histplot(df[\"income\"], kde=True)\n",
    "plt.title(\"Income Distribution\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Income\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Frequency\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "e1a4626a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "sales_data = {\n",
    "    \"product_category\": [\"Electronics\", \"Clothing\", \"Groceries\", \"Electronics\",\n",
    "                         \"Clothing\", \"Groceries\", \"Electronics\"],\n",
    "    \"sales\": [50000, 20000, 15000, 40000, 25000, 18000, 45000]\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "df_sales = pd.DataFrame(sales_data)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "ed48d2c2",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "category_sales = df_sales.groupby(\"product_category\")[\"sales\"].sum().reset_index()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "2f336c73",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "plt.figure()\n",
    "sns.barplot(x=\"product_category\", y=\"sales\", data=category_sales)\n",
    "plt.title(\"Product Sales by Category\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Product Category\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Total Sales\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  }
 ],
